Project Manager.label: Project Manager
Project Manager.summary: Facilitates agile delivery, aligns stakeholders, manages risks, and ensures business goals are met.
details: Leads agile delivery across planning, execution, and stakeholder alignment.
Drives DevOps enablement to accelerate product rollout and reduce defects.
Manages resources, responsibilities, and stakeholder relationships.
Reports progress, issues, dependencies, and risks to leadership.
Plans around delivery constraints to maximize benefits and minimize risks.

Scrum Master.label: Scrum Master
Scrum Master.summary: Facilitates agile ceremonies, removes impediments, and supports the team in following Scrum practices.
details: Agile project management and execution of agile ceremonies.
Ensures adherence to agile principles and practices.

Product Owner.label: Product Owner
Product Owner.summary: Defines product vision, prioritizes backlog, and represents stakeholders' interests.
details: Acts as a bridge between stakeholders and the team.

Team.label: Team
Team.summary: Delivers product increments, collaborates on solutions, and continuously improves processes.
details: Collaborates across teams to incorporate the latest tech stack.
Evaluates team performance and manages competencies.
Implements and maintains content management systems.

Stakeholders.label: Stakeholders
Stakeholders.summary: Provide requirements, feedback, and validate deliverables to ensure business value.
details: Participate in planning and review meetings.
Help align project outcomes with business needs.
